title: hyoscyamus niger subsp. pallidus
intro: Hyoscyamus niger subsp. pallidus, also known as the pale henbane, is a subspecies of the herb Hyoscyamus niger, a plant native to the Mediterranean region. It contains tropane alkaloids, including scopolamine and hyoscyamine, which are responsible for its medicinal properties, including analgesic, antispasmodic, and sedative effects. The health benefits of pale henbane include its use as a treatment for insomnia, anxiety, and pain relief, as well as its application in traditional medicine to reduce inflammation and improve digestion. Pale henbane can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as tinctures, infusions, and ointments, although its use should be approached with caution due to its potential toxicity and side effects.
